nasb.text: They found rich and good pasture, and the land was broad and quiet and peaceful; for those who lived there formerly were Hamites.

esv.text: where they found rich, good pasture, and the land was very broad, quiet, and peaceful, for the former inhabitants there belonged to Ham.

cnv.text: 他們找到了一塊肥美的草場；那地十分寬闊，又清靜、又安寧；從前住在那裡的是含族的人。

ccb.text: 找到了一片肥沃的草场，又辽阔又安静。从前含族人在那里居住。
